# typesense_collection (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "typesense_collection" "posts" {
  name = "posts"

  fields = [
    {
      name = "title"
      type = "string"
    },
    {
      name  = "published_at"
      type  = "int64"
      facet = true
      sort  = true
    },
  ]

  default_sorting_field = "published_at"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `fields` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--fields))
- `name` (String)

### Optional

- `default_sorting_field` (String)
- `enable_nested_fields` (Boolean)
- `symbols_to_index` (List of String)
- `token_separators` (List of String)

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (Number)
- `num_documents` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--fields"></a>
### Nested Schema for `fields`

Required:

- `name` (String)
- `type` (String)

Optional:

- `facet` (Boolean)
- `index` (Boolean)
- `infix` (Boolean)
- `locale` (String)
- `num_dim` (Number)
- `optional` (Boolean)
- `reference` (String)
- `sort` (Boolean)

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
terraform import typesense_collection.posts posts
```
